beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: 3. Minimum 35 credits of Jewish Studies courses from an approved list of electives , to include a minimum of 25 credits completed at the 300-400 level. May include a maximum of 10 credits from the second year of Jewish language courses. 4. Maximum 15 credits (exclusive of language) from an approved UW study abroad program may be counted towards the major.
